# Sunil Prakash

## Profile
Enterprise AI and platform architecture leader. Building production AI/ML and GenAI systems in regulated financial services. Published researcher in multi-agent AI systems.

## Current Role
Vice President, Cloud & Platform Architecture, Deutsche Bank (2021–present)

## Focus Areas
- Multi-agent AI systems (research + production)
- Enterprise AI strategy and operating models
- GenAI platforms: LLM orchestration, guardrails, evaluation pipelines
- RAG systems at enterprise scale
- Data platform architecture (Data Vault 2.0, dbt, BigQuery)
- AI governance and regulatory compliance (EU AI Act, SR 11-7, BCBS 239)
- Cloud platform modernization in banking
- NLP and deep learning pipelines

## Research

DCI: From Debate to Deliberation — Structured Collective Reasoning with Typed Epistemic Acts
- arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.11781
- 4 reasoning archetypes, 14 typed epistemic acts, convergent flow algorithm
- +0.95 over debate on non-routine tasks, 9.56 on hidden-profile (best in study)

LDP: An Identity-Aware Protocol for Multi-Agent LLM Systems
- arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08852
- Rich delegate identity cards, progressive payload modes, governed sessions
- 12x latency gains, 37% token reduction

## Career
- Deutsche Bank: VP, Cloud & Platform Architecture — enterprise AI, data platforms, GenAI governance (2021–present)
- Halialabs: Chief Scientist — AI/ML platform architecture, NLP productionization (2018–2021)
- Cognizant: Technology Specialist / Software Architect (2012–2017)
- Syntel: Software Engineer / Project Lead (2007–2012)

## Education
- PGPMAX (Executive MBA), Indian School of Business
- M.Tech, Enterprise Business Analytics, National University of Singapore
- B.E., Computer Science, RGTU, India
- Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect

- Building Data Foundations While Everyone Chased Models — https://sunilprakash.com/writing/data-foundations-before-ai/

- GPT-3 Changed the Game — Is Enterprise Ready? — https://sunilprakash.com/writing/gpt3-enterprise-not-ready/

- Building NLP Pipelines Before Transformers Were Easy — https://sunilprakash.com/writing/nlp-before-transformers/
- Attention Is All You Need — A Practitioner's Guide — https://sunilprakash.com/writing/attention-is-all-you-need/

## Open Source
- ldp-protocol — LLM Delegate Protocol, Rust reference implementation — https://github.com/sunilp/ldp-protocol
- ldp-research — LDP experiment code and data — https://github.com/sunilp/ldp-research
- enterprise-rag-bench — RAG patterns benchmarked for enterprise — https://github.com/sunilp/enterprise-rag-bench
- enterprise-genai-platform — Reference architecture for LLM applications in banking — https://github.com/sunilp/enterprise-genai-platform
- applied-nlp-research — Production NLP from pre-LLM to post-LLM — https://github.com/sunilp/applied-nlp-research
- ai-governance-framework — AI governance for regulated industries — https://github.com/sunilp/ai-governance-framework
- reference-data-platform-gcp — GCP data platform reference architecture — https://github.com/sunilp/reference-data-platform-gcp
